title: Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal to overturn 25-year prison sentence
summary: Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal to overturn 25-year prison sentence
briefing: A federal appeals court upheld the former FTX chief’s conviction, while his bid for clemency from President Donald Trump appears to face steep political odds.

title: Bitcoin surfs SpaceX IPO at $64K as trader warns key BTC price support may crumble
summary: Bitcoin surfs SpaceX IPO at $64K as trader warns key BTC price support may crumble
briefing: Bitcoin hit $64,000 as SpaceX launched a record-breaking IPO and US-Iran peace deal hopes continued to grow, but doubts over BTC price support remained.

title: Crypto Biz: SpaceX fuels tokenization’s next boom
summary: Crypto Biz: SpaceX fuels tokenization’s next boom
briefing: Tokenized RWAs surge despite crypto volatility, Kraken launches SpaceX IPO xStocks, prediction markets outpace onchain gambling and Sam Bankman-Fried seeks a Trump pardon.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Polish president vetoes crypto bill for third time ahead of MiCA deadline
summary: Polish president vetoes crypto bill for third time ahead of MiCA deadline
briefing: Polish President Karol Nawrocki vetoed a bill to implement MiCA for the third time, just weeks before the end of the EU crypto framework's transitional period.

title: KuCoin has not paid $2M award tied to delisted token dispute, investor says
summary: KuCoin has not paid $2M award tied to delisted token dispute, investor says
briefing: A Seychelles court said KuCoin can’t treat unwithdrawn tokens as “abandoned,” and awarded a Swiss investor over $2 million. He says the exchange still hasn’t paid and plans to sue again.

title: Metaplanet to form securities arm through Siiibo acquisition
summary: Metaplanet to form securities arm through Siiibo acquisition
briefing: Metaplanet will acquire Siiibo Securities and rename it Metaplanet Securities as it builds out Project Nova, its Bitcoin-centric finance strategy in Japan.

title: SpaceX tokenized IPO campaign draws $557M on Binance ahead of debut
summary: SpaceX tokenized IPO campaign draws $557M on Binance ahead of debut
briefing: Crypto markets are becoming a new venue for pre-IPO price discovery ahead of SpaceX's highly anticipated debut today.

title: How Crypto Firms Will Own the Octagon at Trump's White House UFC Event
summary: How Crypto Firms Will Own the Octagon at Trump's White House UFC Event
briefing: President Trump’s upcoming UFC fight will provide several crypto firms with an unprecedented opportunity for corporate branding.

title: AI Agents Still Can't Stop Prompt Injection Attacks, Researchers Warn
summary: AI Agents Still Can't Stop Prompt Injection Attacks, Researchers Warn
briefing: A new benchmark study found AI agents remain vulnerable to prompt injection attacks as companies increasingly roll out the technology to the public.

title: Moonshot AI's Kimi Work Brings 300 AI Agents to Your Desktop
summary: Moonshot AI's Kimi Work Brings 300 AI Agents to Your Desktop
briefing: Kimi Work lets an AI agent loose on your local files, your browser, and your schedule—without routing everything through the cloud.

title: Americans Fear Job Losses Due to AI But Hope for Cancer, Alzheimer’s Cures: Anthropic Survey
summary: Americans Fear Job Losses Due to AI But Hope for Cancer, Alzheimer’s Cures: Anthropic Survey
briefing: Anthropic's AI survey showed Americans are afraid of job losses, hopeful for health breakthroughs, and distrustful of firms behind the tech.

title: Crypto Firms Scrap Tokenized SpaceX Share Offerings as SPCX Surges After IPO
summary: Crypto Firms Scrap Tokenized SpaceX Share Offerings as SPCX Surges After IPO
briefing: Participants were refunded and did not receive shares in the record-breaking SpaceX IPO from Elon Musk's rocket company.

title: Tennessee Man Indicted for Alleged Crypto Ponzi Scheme That Stole Millions From Investors
summary: Tennessee Man Indicted for Alleged Crypto Ponzi Scheme That Stole Millions From Investors
briefing: Feds indicted a Tennessee man for allegedly running a crypto Ponzi scheme from 2020-2024 and bilking investors out of millions.

title: Iran-Linked Group That Hacked Kash Patel's Email Threatens World Cup With Hijacked FBI Drones
summary: Iran-Linked Group That Hacked Kash Patel's Email Threatens World Cup With Hijacked FBI Drones
briefing: The Iran-linked hacking group said it accessed footage from FBI-controlled drones and warned World Cup teams that they could be targeted.

title: Americans Traded Up to $34 Billion on Offshore Prediction Markets: Study
summary: Americans Traded Up to $34 Billion on Offshore Prediction Markets: Study
briefing: The study estimated Americans could end up wagering up to $133 billion annually on offshore prediction markets by 2030.
